name: triage
description: Automated Jira triage pipeline: pull tasks from the boards you name, filter by size in three discarding gates (description-only filter, in-code pre-triage, plan), open a draft WIP PR on Bitbucket with a plain-language summary per surviving task, pause for your approval, then deliver the approved ones through the SDD TDD loop and flip the draft to Ready. Reuses the sdd plugin's plan/implement methods; nothing runs to completion without your checkpoint.
